name: node-columnify
title: node-columnify
summary: Render data in text columns with in-column text-wrap
description:
Render data in text columns with in-column text-wrap
Create text-based columns suitable for console output from objects or arrays
of objects.
.
Columns are automatically resized to fit the content of the largest cell.
Each cell will be padded with spaces to fill the available space and ensure
column contents are left-aligned.
.
Designed to handle sensible wrapping in npm search results.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-columnify because Render data in text columns with in-column text-wrap.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-columnify as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-columnify with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-columnify --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
